description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a mix of large glass windows and solid wall sections. The exterior features a combination of light and dark materials, with prominent use of concrete, glass, and wood accents. The house includes a landscaped front yard with a pathway, trees, and shrubs, as well as a backyard area with a pool, patio, and pergola. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some spanning floor-to-ceiling, providing ample natural light. The main entryway is marked by a central door with a small overhang and steps leading up from the sidewalk. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with outdoor living areas.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, landscaped yards, and a backyard pool and patio area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, landscaped path, and trees leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extensive glass windows and the length of the building, with visible backyard greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, patio, pergola, and large windows opening to the outdoor area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more windows, the backyard, and dense greenery along the property edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with small overhang, steps, and landscaped approach
